hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import subprocess, json, sys
r1 = subprocess.run(['ldconfig', '-p'], capture_output=True, text=True)
franka_libs = [l.strip() for l in r1.stdout.splitlines() if 'franka' in l]
r2 = subprocess.run(['dpkg', '-l'], capture_output=True, text=True)
franka_pkgs = [l.strip() for l in r2.stdout.splitlines() if 'franka' in l]
r3 = subprocess.run(['find', '/usr/local', '/opt/ros', '-name', 'FrankaConfig.cmake'], capture_output=True, text=True)
ctx = 'libfranka status:\n'
ctx += 'Libraries: ' + (', '.join(franka_libs) if franka_libs else 'NONE') + '\n'
ctx += 'Apt packages: ' + (', '.join(franka_pkgs) if franka_pkgs else 'NONE') + '\n'
ctx += 'CMake configs: ' + (r3.stdout.strip() if r3.stdout.strip() else 'NONE')
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
"
